skills.name: auth-setup
skills.description: Set up auth for Next.js apps. Better Auth & Firebase. Email/password, Google OAuth, sessions, middleware, UI components, provider README with full config steps. Auto-detects themes.

skills.name: auth-doctor
skills.description: Diagnose and fix issues in existing auth setups. Scans environment, files, security, middleware, OAuth, database, and dangerous code patterns. Produces scored health report with actionable fixes.
